case_title: LIZ SAINTSING VS. NANCY LIN et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAINTSING, LIZ AS TO DEFENDANT ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-12-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY SAINTSING, LIZ AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAINTSING, LIZ AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-12-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAINTSING, LIZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP. $538.40 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $588.40, BASED ON DEFENDANT'S CALCULATION PLAINTIFF WAS CREDITED WITH A $500.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT PLUS ACCURED INTEREST OF $ 148.40. THE COURT ALLOWS CHARGES TOTALING $110.00 FOR CLEANING EXPENSES. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD, ACCORDING TO PROOF AT TRIAL. DEFENDANT NANCY LIN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LIN, NANCY ALCO CALIFORNIA CORP. ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO NANCY LIN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-17-2008 AT 10:00AM.
